About us

We build systems.
Not slides.

Tergo Media is an AI automation and custom software agency. We started in 2015, and we've been shipping things that work ever since. No juniors. No outsourcing. You work with us, directly.

The founders

Two people. 20+ years
of combined experience.

CEOStrategyClient Partnerships

Maria Terragni

CEO & Co-Founder

10+ years leading digital transformation across real estate, travel, and professional services. Former management consultant turned founder. Maria leads every client relationship and ensures delivery stays on track and on brief.

Business strategyDigital transformationClient leadershipAI implementation
LinkedIn →
CTOEngineeringAI Architecture

Francesco Terragni

CTO & Co-Founder

Full-stack engineer and AI architect with 10+ years building production systems. Francesco leads all technical work — architecture, code, automation design, and quality. He has shipped over 100 products to production.

React / Next.jsNode.js / PythonAI pipelinesn8n / MakeAWS / Docker
LinkedIn →
How we work

Direct. Fast.
No bullshit.

01

You talk to the people who build it

No account managers, no handoffs. Maria handles the relationship; Francesco handles the build. You always know who to call.

02

Fixed prices, clear deliverables

No hourly billing surprises. We scope everything upfront and charge a fixed price. Budget certainty from day one.

03

Weekly progress, always

You see what we've built every week. Not at the end of a two-month sprint — every week.

04

You own everything

Code, automations, accounts, documentation — all yours. We hand over with full training and 30-day support.

Automate my business →How it works
How we work

From first call to live system —
in weeks, not months.

Fixed-price proposals. Clear deliverables. No bloated retainers. No surprises.

01

Automation audit

We map your workflows, identify where time is lost, and quantify the impact. Free for qualified leads.

1–2 DAYS
02

Design & scoping

Architecture decisions, tool selection, and a fixed-price proposal with clear milestones.

3–5 DAYS
03

Build & test

Iterative sprints with weekly demos. You see progress every week, not after months of silence.

2–8 WEEKS
04

Launch & handover

Full documentation, team training, and 30-day post-launch support. You own everything.

1 WEEK
Start a project →
Real estate brokerage · Dubai · 12 agents
Before vs after automation
Drag the handle to compare — left is before, right is after

Before
Lead response4+ hours
Admin hrs/week38 hrs
Auto-handled0%
CRM accuracy~60%
Revenue recov.AED 0
Reporting6+ hrs
After
Lead response90 sec
Admin hrs/week4 hrs
Auto-handled94%
CRM accuracy100%
Revenue recov.AED 18K
ReportingAuto
PROJECT TIMELINE
Discovery call & audit
Week 1
Scoping & fixed-price proposal
Week 1–2
Build: lead capture + WhatsApp AI
Week 2–4
Launch: CRM sync + reporting live
Week 5 — live now
30-day support & optimisation
Week 6–9

Let's build something
together.
